corrected_fields.summary: This is a navigation/index page from the ECB website that lists menu links to indicative operational calendars for reserve maintenance periods covering years 2000 through 2026. No substantive content, data, decisions, or policy information is provided on this page.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This page contains no archiveable content. It serves only as a directory to access individual reserve maintenance period calendars. Researchers seeking ECB operational data should navigate to the linked sub-pages for actual calendar information.
